text:
Created attachment 218389
patch to fix build

Patch to fix this error on head:

[00:01:03] ld: error: duplicate symbol: iface
[00:01:03] >>> defined at main.c
[00:01:03] >>>            main.o:(iface)
[00:01:03] >>> defined at iface.c
[00:01:03] >>>            iface.o:(.bss+0x0)
